# jamfschool_user_group (Data Source)

Use this data source to look up a Jamf School user group by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "jamfschool_user_group" "example" {
  id = 456
}

output "group_name" {
  value = data.jamfschool_user_group.example.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) Unique identifier of the group.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description.
- `jamf_parent` (String) Jamf Parent feature status.
- `jamf_school_teacher` (String) Jamf School Teacher feature status.
- `location_id` (Number) Location ID.
- `name` (String) Name of the group.
- `user_count` (Number) Number of users.
